title: The Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act, 2005
full_text: The Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act, 2005 तटीय जलकृषि प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200524 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 2005-06-23 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act, 2005 Hindi Title: तटीय जलकृषि प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Coastal Aquaculture Authority for regulating the activities connected with coastal aquaculture in the coastal areas and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Fisheries Enforcement Date: 16-12-2005 Notification: 16th December, 2005, ss. 2 to 26 (both inclusive), vide notification No. S.O. 1771(E), dated 16th December, 2005, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Coastal Aquaculture Authority Act, 2005 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II GENERAL POWERS OF CENTRAL GOVERNMENT CHAPTER III THE COASTAL AQUACULTURE AUTHORITY CHAPTER IV POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF AUTHORITY CHAPTER V FINANACE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power of Central Government to take measures to protect environment. Section 4. Establishment of Authority and appointment of Chairperson and members. Section 5. Disqualifications for appointment as member. Section 6. Eligibility of member for reappointment. Section 7. Meetings of Authority. Section 7A. Committees of Authority. Section 8. Vacancy in Authority not to invalidate proceeding. Section 9. Appointment of officers, consultants and other employees of Authority. Section 9A. Secretary of Authority. Section 10. Authentication of orders and other instruments of Authority. Section 11. Functions of Authority. Section 12. Power to enter. Section 12A. Prohibition of certain materials. Section 13. Registration for coastal aquaculture. Section 13A. Authorisation of officers. Section 14. Penalty for carrying on coastal aquaculture in contravention of provisions of Act. Section 14A. Appeal. Section 15. Cognizance of offence. Section 16. Payment to Authority. Section 17. Fund of Authority. Section 18. Budget. Section 19. Annual report. Section 20. Accounts and audit. Section 21. Chairperson and other members, officers and other employees of Authority, etc., to be public servants. Section 22. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 22A. Arrears of cost and penalty recoverable as arrears of land revenue. Section 23. Power to remove difficulties. Section 24. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Power of Authority to make regulations. Section 26. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 27. Validation. Section 28. Validation of certain provisions and amendments retrospectively.
